slides.title: AI Strategy Briefing
slides.message: A board-ready view of where AI can create value, where risk needs control, and what to do next.
slides.visual_direction: Use a strong title slide with executive contrast.

slides.title: Executive summary
slides.message: AI can improve knowledge work, customer operations, and decision velocity when paired with governance and focused use cases.

content_blocks.label: Value
content_blocks.text: Prioritize high-volume workflows where cycle time and quality are measurable.

content_blocks.label: Control
content_blocks.text: Use managed identity, approved data sources, and traceable generation paths.

content_blocks.label: Action
content_blocks.text: Start with one template-governed assistant and expand after quality gates are met.

slides.title: Why a Foundry-native approach
slides.message: The experience can feel like consumer AI presentation tools while meeting enterprise requirements.

content_blocks.label: Generic deck generator
content_blocks.text: Fast artifact creation, but limited control over templates, storage, identity, and auditability.

content_blocks.label: Foundry-native generator
content_blocks.text: Customer-owned templates, governed tools, grounded sources, RBAC, tracing, and repeatable quality checks.

slides.title: Path to a pilot
slides.message: A narrow pilot can prove template fidelity, artifact quality, and revision workflow before production hardening.

content_blocks.label: 1. Onboard
content_blocks.text: Select one approved template and define supported layouts.

content_blocks.label: 2. Generate
content_blocks.text: Create structured slide plans and render the deck deterministically.

content_blocks.label: 3. Validate
content_blocks.text: Check placeholders, package integrity, slide count, and brand rules.

slides.title: Key risks and mitigations
slides.message: The pilot should constrain template support and quality gates so the first customer experience is predictable.

content_blocks.label: Template variability
content_blocks.text: Start with a layout catalog and explicit template contract.

content_blocks.label: Visual overflow
content_blocks.text: Keep generated copy concise and validate text length before delivery.

content_blocks.label: Ungrounded claims
content_blocks.text: Require source mappings for research-heavy slides.

slides.title: Recommended next step
slides.message: Build a Foundry-hosted prototype around one customer template and one high-value executive briefing workflow.

content_blocks.label: Decision
content_blocks.text: Approve a template-first pilot that demonstrates polished generation inside the Microsoft boundary.

slides.visual_direction: Strong closing slide with one callout.
